examples: There are creepy-crawly sensations, like insects crawling beneath the skin.
Sufferers complain of intensely creepy-crawly skin and odd fibrous strands which protrude from open wounds.
The Insectarium, part of the Audubon Nature Institute, pays tribute to everything creepy and crawly.
"I think it starts with the writing, " said Michelle Dockery (Lady Mary Crawly).
Mr. ROBERT MCCULLOGH (Utility Analyst): It's very difficult to pick up a rock around Enron and not find a creepy crawly underneath it.
